query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A person with short hair wearing dark sunglasses and a black sleeveless top stands against a plain light-colored wall. They grasp the neckline of their top with one hand while laughing with their head tilted back. The image is captured from a low vantage point looking upward toward the subject.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person with short hair wearing dark sunglasses and a black sleeveless top stands against a plain light-colored wall, captured from an extreme low angle with amateur snapshot energy. Harsh flash-style lighting creates extreme exposure contrast, blowing out the face, neck, and chest into bright, featureless highlights while the black top falls into crushed, undetailed shadow. The subject grasps their neckline with one hand and laughs with their head thrown back in an informally composed, unconventionally framed shot.
